---
title: "The Best Laid Spans"
subtitle: "An AI Agent That Instruments Your Code with OpenTelemetry"
author: "Whitney Lee"
format: revealjs
---

## {data-transition="none"}

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'wrappingWidth': 700, 'rankSpacing': 25}}}%%
flowchart TB
    BL["`**Business Logic** — ❌ no automation — the code unique to your business`"]
    FW["`**Framework** — ✅ HTTP, databases, messaging via OTel auto-instrumentation`"]
    SM["`**Service Mesh** — ✅ L7 proxy telemetry via Istio, Linkerd`"]
    KN["`**Kernel** — ✅ system calls via eBPF — Cilium`"]
    INF["`**Infrastructure** — ✅ host and cluster metrics`"]

    BL --- FW
    FW --- SM
    SM --- KN
    KN --- INF

    linkStyle 0,1,2,3 stroke:white,fill:none

    classDef automated fill:#E8F5E9,stroke:#2E7D32,stroke-width:2px,color:#1B5E20
    classDef gap fill:#FFEBEE,stroke:#C62828,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray:5 5,color:#B71C1C
    classDef hidden fill:white,stroke:white,color:white

    class INF automated
    class KN,SM,FW,BL hidden
```

::: {.notes}
Every automated telemetry layer that can be built has been built. Starting from the bottom: Infrastructure — host and cluster metrics.
:::

## {data-transition="none"}

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'wrappingWidth': 700, 'rankSpacing': 25}}}%%
flowchart TB
    BL["`**Business Logic** — ❌ no automation — the code unique to your business`"]
    FW["`**Framework** — ✅ HTTP, databases, messaging via OTel auto-instrumentation`"]
    SM["`**Service Mesh** — ✅ L7 proxy telemetry via Istio, Linkerd`"]
    KN["`**Kernel** — ✅ system calls via eBPF — Cilium`"]
    INF["`**Infrastructure** — ✅ host and cluster metrics`"]

    BL --- FW
    FW --- SM
    SM --- KN
    KN --- INF

    linkStyle 0,1,2,3 stroke:white,fill:none

    classDef automated fill:#E8F5E9,stroke:#2E7D32,stroke-width:2px,color:#1B5E20
    classDef gap fill:#FFEBEE,stroke:#C62828,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray:5 5,color:#B71C1C
    classDef hidden fill:white,stroke:white,color:white

    class INF,KN automated
    class SM,FW,BL hidden
```

::: {.notes}
Kernel — system calls via eBPF. Cilium.
:::

## {data-transition="none"}

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'wrappingWidth': 700, 'rankSpacing': 25}}}%%
flowchart TB
    BL["`**Business Logic** — ❌ no automation — the code unique to your business`"]
    FW["`**Framework** — ✅ HTTP, databases, messaging via OTel auto-instrumentation`"]
    SM["`**Service Mesh** — ✅ L7 proxy telemetry via Istio, Linkerd`"]
    KN["`**Kernel** — ✅ system calls via eBPF — Cilium`"]
    INF["`**Infrastructure** — ✅ host and cluster metrics`"]

    BL --- FW
    FW --- SM
    SM --- KN
    KN --- INF

    linkStyle 0,1,2,3 stroke:white,fill:none

    classDef automated fill:#E8F5E9,stroke:#2E7D32,stroke-width:2px,color:#1B5E20
    classDef gap fill:#FFEBEE,stroke:#C62828,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray:5 5,color:#B71C1C
    classDef hidden fill:white,stroke:white,color:white

    class INF,KN,SM automated
    class FW,BL hidden
```

::: {.notes}
Service Mesh — L7 proxy telemetry. Istio, Linkerd.
:::

## {data-transition="none"}

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'wrappingWidth': 700, 'rankSpacing': 25}}}%%
flowchart TB
    BL["`**Business Logic** — ❌ no automation — the code unique to your business`"]
    FW["`**Framework** — ✅ HTTP, databases, messaging via OTel auto-instrumentation`"]
    SM["`**Service Mesh** — ✅ L7 proxy telemetry via Istio, Linkerd`"]
    KN["`**Kernel** — ✅ system calls via eBPF — Cilium`"]
    INF["`**Infrastructure** — ✅ host and cluster metrics`"]

    BL --- FW
    FW --- SM
    SM --- KN
    KN --- INF

    linkStyle 0,1,2,3 stroke:white,fill:none

    classDef automated fill:#E8F5E9,stroke:#2E7D32,stroke-width:2px,color:#1B5E20
    classDef gap fill:#FFEBEE,stroke:#C62828,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray:5 5,color:#B71C1C
    classDef hidden fill:white,stroke:white,color:white

    class INF,KN,SM,FW automated
    class BL hidden
```

::: {.notes}
Framework — HTTP, databases, messaging via OTel auto-instrumentation. No code changes needed.
:::

## {data-transition="none"}

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'wrappingWidth': 700, 'rankSpacing': 25}}}%%
flowchart TB
    BL["`**Business Logic** — ❌ no automation — the code unique to your business`"]
    FW["`**Framework** — ✅ HTTP, databases, messaging via OTel auto-instrumentation`"]
    SM["`**Service Mesh** — ✅ L7 proxy telemetry via Istio, Linkerd`"]
    KN["`**Kernel** — ✅ system calls via eBPF — Cilium`"]
    INF["`**Infrastructure** — ✅ host and cluster metrics`"]

    BL --- FW
    FW --- SM
    SM --- KN
    KN --- INF

    linkStyle 0,1,2,3 stroke:white,fill:none

    classDef automated fill:#E8F5E9,stroke:#2E7D32,stroke-width:2px,color:#1B5E20
    classDef gap fill:#FFEBEE,stroke:#C62828,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray:5 5,color:#B71C1C
    classDef hidden fill:white,stroke:white,color:white

    class INF,KN,SM,FW automated
    class BL gap
```

::: {.notes}
Business Logic — the code that differentiates your company from every other company. Which discount applied, which path ran, what state was read. No automated layer reaches it. This is the gap.
:::

## {background-image="images/trace-before.png" background-size="contain" background-color="white"}

::: {.notes}
A checkout request takes 3 seconds. Framework instrumentation shows the HTTP call and a slow database query. But there's a gap — we can see the request is slow, we cannot see why.
:::

## {background-image="images/trace-after.png" background-size="contain" background-color="white"}

::: {.notes}
Add business logic spans from Spinybacked Orbweaver, and the root cause becomes visible: a synchronous call to a third-party warehouse API on every request, not reading from local cache.
:::

## {.center data-transition="none"}

::: {style="font-size: 1.6em; font-weight: bold; color: #00897B; text-align: center;"}
Spinybacked Orbweaver
:::

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
![](images/spinybacked-orbweaver-spider.png){width="38%" style="opacity: 0;"}
:::

::: {style="color: white;"}
An AI agent that instruments code with OpenTelemetry
:::

::: {.notes}
:::

## {.center data-transition="none"}

::: {style="font-size: 1.6em; font-weight: bold; color: #00897B; text-align: center;"}
Spinybacked Orbweaver
:::

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
![](images/spinybacked-orbweaver-spider.png){width="38%"}
:::

::: {style="color: white;"}
An AI agent that instruments code with OpenTelemetry
:::

::: {.notes}
:::

## {.center data-transition="none"}

::: {style="font-size: 1.6em; font-weight: bold; color: #00897B; text-align: center;"}
Spinybacked Orbweaver
:::

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
![](images/spinybacked-orbweaver-spider.png){width="38%"}
:::

An AI agent that instruments code with OpenTelemetry

::: {.notes}
Meet Spinybacked Orbweaver. It's an AI-powered telemetry instrumentation agent. It analyzes your JavaScript and TypeScript code, adds OpenTelemetry spans, validates its own output, and opens a pull request.
:::

## {data-transition="none"}

<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:100%; gap:2em;">
<div style="flex:1; text-align:right; font-size:0.9em; line-height:2.4;">
<span style="color:white;">source file →</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">schema →</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">rules →</span>
</div>
<div style="flex:0 0 auto; text-align:center;">
<img src="images/spinybacked-orbweaver-spider.png" width="240px">
</div>
<div style="flex:1; text-align:left; font-size:0.9em; line-height:2.4;">
<span style="color:white;">→ instrumented file</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">→ reasoning report</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">→ passing tests</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">→ live-check pass</span>
</div>
</div>

::: {.notes}
:::

<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:100%; gap:2em;">

<span style="color:white;">→ live-check pass</span>
</div>
</div>

::: {.notes}
:::

## {data-transition="none"}

<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:100%; gap:2em;">
<div style="flex:1; text-align:right; font-size:0.9em; line-height:2.4;">
<span style="color:#E91E63;">source file →</span><br>
<span style="color:#F57C00;">schema →</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">rules →</span>
</div>
<div style="flex:0 0 auto; text-align:center;">
<img src="images/spinybacked-orbweaver-spider.png" width="240px">
</div>
<div style="flex:1; text-align:left; font-size:0.9em; line-height:2.4;">
<span style="color:white;">→ instrumented file</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">→ reasoning report</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">→ passing tests</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">→ live-check pass</span>
</div>
</div>

::: {.notes}
:::

## {data-transition="none"}

<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:100%; gap:2em;">
<div style="flex:1; text-align:right; font-size:0.9em; line-height:2.4;">
<span style="color:#E91E63;">source file →</span><br>
<span style="color:#F57C00;">schema →</span><br>
<a href="https://github.com/wiggitywhitney/spinybacked-orbweaver/blob/main/docs/rules-reference.md" style="color:#2E7D32; text-decoration:none;">rules →</a>
</div>
<div style="flex:0 0 auto; text-align:center;">
<img src="images/spinybacked-orbweaver-spider.png" width="240px">
</div>
<div style="flex:1; text-align:left; font-size:0.9em; line-height:2.4;">
<span style="color:white;">→ instrumented file</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">→ reasoning report</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">→ passing tests</span><br>
<span style="color:white;">→ live-check pass</span>
</div>
</div>

::: {.notes}
Spinybacked Orbweaver takes three inputs: your uninstrumented source code, your resolved telemetry schema — the machine-readable definition of what your telemetry should look like — and a set of validation rules.
:::

## {data-transition="none"}

<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:100%; gap:2em;">

::: {.notes}

</div>
